propositions: The code-review sidecar (code_review_result_v1) persists only surfaced findings (blocking/advisory/coaching) and omits the dropped and indeterminate buckets, so the complete Pass-1 finding list is not recoverable.
The sidecar does not persist the resolved block_threshold/blocking_enabled each finding was judged against.

Extend the sidecar to code_review_result_v2 pooling all four buckets (blocking, advisory, dropped, indeterminate), each finding retaining its verification, Pass-3 decision, and resolved threshold fields plus a norm_id.
code_review_coach must forward dropped/indeterminate from the decide step into the terminal verdict dict, with schema updates for the new optional arrays.
The reader (latest_code_review_result) must accept both code_review_result_v1 and _v2 schemas so old records stay readable and the surfaced reader keeps returning the blocking+advisory union.
Code review has no overflow bucket unlike plan-review, and code-review findings carry no evidence/scenarios fields.
